title: pycnocomon scabrum
intro: Pycnocomon scabrum, also known as the rough buck's-beard, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various respiratory issues, including bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and antitussive effects. The health benefits of Pycnocomon scabrum include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Pycnocomon scabrum often involve the leaves and flowers being made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
